name: Orbax (JAX Checkpointing and Export)

agent_readiness.notes: JAX checkpointing and model export library. import orbax.checkpoint as ocp. checkpointer = ocp.StandardCheckpointer(). checkpointer.save('/path/to/ckpt', args=ocp.args.StandardSave(pytree)). pytree = checkpointer.restore('/path/to/ckpt', args=ocp.args.StandardRestore(target)). Async: ocp.AsyncCheckpointer. GCS support: 'gs://bucket/path'. PyTreeCheckpointHandler for complex structures. Export: orbax.export for TF SavedModel / TFLite. Integrates with Flax, Optax. Replaces legacy flax.training.checkpoints.

gotchas: API changed significantly between versions — legacy vs new API coexist
Async checkpointing requires explicit wait() calls to ensure completion
Export (orbax.export) is separate from checkpointing and has different API
best_when: JAX/Flax model checkpointing with GCS or local storage
Distributed training with async checkpoint saves
Exporting JAX models to TF SavedModel or TFLite
When Flax trainer integration is needed
avoid_when: Simple use cases where pickle or numpy.save suffices
When safetensors format is preferred for security
summary: Orbax provides JAX/Flax checkpointing and model export. ocp.StandardCheckpointer().save('/ckpt', args=ocp.args.StandardSave(pytree)). Async checkpointing. GCS support. orbax.export for TF SavedModel/TFLite. Apache-2.0 by Google. Standard checkpoint library for JAX ecosystem (Flax, Optax). API changed significantly — use new StandardCheckpointer API, not legacy flax.training.checkpoints.
